subcodes.first_line: O wanderer in the wilderness of God's love! Thou hast drunk from the fountain of life and tasted the honeyed sweetness of recognizing the Beauty of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته دشت محبت الله از معین حیوان نوشیدی و از شهد عرفان جمال رحمن چشیدی
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
